name: RegisterPatient
purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, and generate unique patient_id
behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present; generate a new patient_id; store patient data in patients database; return success with patient_id

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (patient_id), message

preconditions: patient_data contains name, dob, contact, insurance
postconditions: patient record exists in patients database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (patient_id), message

global_vars.description: Write new patient record with generated patient_id

constraints.description: patient_data must contain name, dob, contact, insurance

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients database with unique patient_id

name: BookAppointment
purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients; check doctor availability at requested time; create appointment record in appointments database; return success with appointment_id

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (appointment_id), message

postconditions: appointment record exists in appointments database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (appointment_id), message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify patient_id exists
Read existing appointments for availability check and write new appointment record

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database
appointment_time must be in the future

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record created in appointments database with unique appointment_id

name: RetrieveRecords
purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (list of records), message

postconditions: records are returned sorted by date descending

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (list of records), message

global_vars.description: Read all records for the given patient_id

data_operations.description: Retrieve patient records sorted by date

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database

acceptance_criteria.description: All records for patient_id returned sorted by timestamp descending

name: UpdatePatientProfile
purpose: Update patient profile fields; if insurance changed, validate against external system
behavior: Update patient record in patients database with provided fields; if insurance field is present and different from current, validate via external system before saving; return success

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (updated fields), message

postconditions: patient record is updated in database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (updated fields), message

global_vars.description: Read current patient record and write updated fields

data_operations.description: Read current profile and update with new fields

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile updated in patients database with validated insurance if changed
